title: AetherFlow (Letterbox Mod)
description: This mod adds a cinematic letterbox effect when sneaking.
body: --- # 🪐 AetherFlow (LetterboxMod) > A Minecraft Fabric mod that adds a cinematic letterbox effect when sneaking. ## 🧩 Features - Smooth black bars fade in/out when sneaking (Shift). - Bars appear behind the hotbar and other HUD elements. - Ease-in / ease-out animation style. - Minimal performance impact. ## 📦 Installation 1. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/). 2. Install [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api). 3. Download the latest release of **LetterboxMod** from [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/) or the [Releases](https://github.com/beltrancruz/aetherflow_letterbox/releases) section. 4. Drop the `.jar` file into your `mods/` folder. 5. Launch the game! ## 🖼️ Preview ![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d0ff280138a6c240704f78adce5f90e3bb117d8.gif) ## ⚙️ Configuration _No configuration needed. The mod activates the effect automatically when sneaking._ ## 👤 Credits Developed by **@beltrancruz** Special thanks to [FabricMC](https://fabricmc.net/) and the Minecraft modding community. ## 🪪 License This project is licensed under the **MIT License**.
